    DepartmentService.getDepartmentsByCompany(Long companyId, PUser requestingUser)

  • Uses of PUser in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.document

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.document with parameters of type PUser
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Document
    DocumentService.addNewVersion(Long documentInfoId, PUser user, byte[] content, String mimeType, String comment)
    ---------- Creates a new version for an existing document ----------
    void
    DocumentService.cancelCheckOut(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
    ----------Cancels a check out process----------
    Document
    DocumentService.checkIn(Long documentInfoId, byte[] content, String mimeType, String comment, PUser user)
    ----------Checks in a document (unlock the document in the DB) ----------
    void
    DocumentService.checkOut(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
    ----------Checks out a document (lock the document in the DB) ----------
    long
    DocumentService.countDocumentsInGroup(Long groupId, PUser user)
    Count of documents in a group (the count callback for the lazy admin grid).
    DocumentInfo
    DocumentService.createDocument(String name, Long groupId, PUser user, byte[] content, String mimeType)
    ---------- Creates a new logical document (DocumentInfo) and the first version (Document). ---------- Call this method to create a new document
    DocumentGroup
    DocumentService.createDocumentGroup(String name, Department dept, PUser user)
    Creates a document group inside a department (for the admin group management screen).
    void
    DocumentService.deleteDocument(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
     
    void
    DocumentService.deleteDocumentGroup(Long groupId, PUser user)
     
    DocumentService.DocumentDownload
    DocumentService.getCurrentVersionForDownload(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
    The binary payload of a document's current version, for a download-for-control action in the admin GUI (view/download only — the admin never edits or checks out documents).
    DocumentInfo
    DocumentService.getDocument(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
     
    List<DocumentGroup>
    DocumentService.getDocumentGroupsByDepartment(Long departmentId, PUser user)
    Lists the document groups of a department (for the admin group management screen).
    List<Document>
    DocumentService.getDocumentHistory(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
    Returns all versions, newest first
    List<DocumentInfo>
    DocumentService.getDocumentsInGroup(Long groupId, PUser user)
    ---------- Returns all current documents in the given DocumentGroup ----------
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<DocumentSummaryDTO>
    DocumentService.getDocumentsInGroup(Long groupId, PUser user, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Paged variant of DocumentService.getDocumentsInGroupAsDTO(Long, PUser) for the admin document list.
    List<DocumentSummaryDTO>
    DocumentService.getDocumentsInGroupAsDTO(Long groupId, PUser user)
     
    List<DocumentSummaryDTO>
    DocumentService.getRecentDocuments(PUser user)
     
    Document
    DocumentService.getSpecificVersion(Long documentInfoId, Long version, PUser user)
     
    DocumentGroup
    DocumentService.renameDocumentGroup(Long groupId, String newName, PUser user)
    Renames a document group (the only editable field).
    List<DocumentSummaryDTO>
    DocumentService.searchDocumentsByName(String name, PUser user)
     

  • Uses of PUser in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.nfc

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.nfc with parameters of type PUser
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    NfcUnit
    NfcUnitService.bindTask(Long nfcUnitId, Long taskId, PUser user)
    Binds a NfcUnit.NfcUnitType.TIMETRACKER tag to the task whose tracking it should toggle (Variant 2: one tracker tag ↔ exactly one task).
    void
    NfcUnitService.deleteNfcUnit(Long nfcUnitId, PUser user)
    Deletes an NFC tag.
    List<NfcUnit>
    NfcUnitService.getNfcUnitsForResource(Long resourceId, PUser user)
     
    NfcUnit
    NfcUnitService.registerNfcUnit(Long resourceId, NfcUnitService.NfcUnitData data, PUser user)
    Registers a new NFC tag on a resource.
    NfcUnitService.ScanResult
    NfcUnitService.scan(String uuid, PUser user)
    Processes a scan of the tag with the given uuid.
    NfcUnit
    NfcUnitService.unbindTask(Long nfcUnitId, PUser user)
    Clears the task binding of a TIMETRACKER tag.

  • Uses of PUser in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.process

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.process with parameters of type PUser
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProcessDefinitionDTO
    ProcessDefinitionService.activate(Long id, PUser user)
    Deploys the definition's current document version to the engine and makes it startable.
    void
    ProcessInstanceService.cancel(String processInstanceId, String reason, PUser user)
    Cancels a running instance.
    ProcessDefinitionDTO
    ProcessDefinitionService.deactivate(Long id, PUser user)
    Takes an active definition out of service: no new instances can be started from it, while instances that are already running continue untouched.
    ProcessDefinitionDTO
    ProcessDefinitionService.get(Long id, PUser user)
    A single definition.
    ProcessInstanceDTO
    ProcessInstanceService.get(String processInstanceId, PUser user)
    A single instance by its engine id.
    List<ProcessDefinitionDTO>
    ProcessDefinitionService.getAll(PUser user)
    All registered definitions, deployed or not.
    List<ProcessInstanceDTO>
    ProcessInstanceService.getForProject(Long projectId, PUser user)
    The process instances belonging to a project — the ones started for the project itself plus the ones linked to its tasks, running and already finished.
    Optional<ProcessInstanceDTO>
    ProcessInstanceService.getForTask(Long taskId, PUser user)
    The instance a task is linked to, running or finished.
    ProcessDefinitionDTO
    ProcessDefinitionService.register(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
    Registers the document's current version as a process definition, in state ProcessDefinitionState.DRAFT.
    ProcessInstanceDTO
    ProcessInstanceService.startForProject(Long projectId, Long definitionId, Map<String,Object> variables, PUser user)
    Starts an instance of an active definition for a whole project.
    ProcessInstanceDTO
    ProcessInstanceService.startForTask(Long taskId, Long definitionId, Map<String,Object> variables, PUser user)
    Starts an instance of an active definition for a single task and links the two.
    void
    ProcessDefinitionService.unregister(Long id, boolean force, PUser user)
    Removes a definition from the registry, optionally tearing down its engine deployment too.
    void
    ProcessDefinitionService.unregister(Long id, PUser user)
    Removes a ProcessDefinitionState.DRAFT definition from the registry.

  • Uses of PUser in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.project

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.project with parameters of type PUser
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Project
    ProjectService.addDocument(Long projectId, Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
     
    Project
    ProjectService.addMember(Long projectId, Long userId, PUser user)
     
    Project
    ProjectService.addResource(Long projectId, Long resourceId, PUser user)
     
    Task
    TaskService.assignGoal(Long taskId, Long goalId, PUser user)
    Assigns the task to one of its own project's goals, so it contributes to that goal's progress.
    Task
    TaskService.assignTask(Long taskId, Long actorId, PUser user)
    Assigns a task to an actor (person or machine).
    Task
    TaskService.changeStatus(Long taskId, TaskStatus newStatus, PUser user)
    Changes a task's status.
    ProjectGoalService.ProjectProgress
    ProjectGoalService.computeProgress(Long projectId, PUser user)
    Computes the progress of a project from its goals and their tasks.
    ProjectGoal
    ProjectGoalService.createGoal(Long projectId, ProjectGoalService.GoalData data, PUser user)
    Creates a goal on the given project.
    Project
    ProjectService.createProject(ProjectService.ProjectData data, PUser creator)
    Creates a new project with an empty blackboard.
    Task
    TaskService.createTask(Long projectId, TaskService.TaskData data, PUser user)
    Creates a task on the given project's blackboard with status TaskStatus.CREATED.
    void
    ProjectGoalService.deleteGoal(Long projectId, Long goalId, PUser user)
    Deletes a goal.
    void
    ProjectService.deleteProject(Long projectId, PUser user)
    Deletes a project (and, by cascade, its blackboard and tasks).
    void
    TaskService.deleteTask(Long taskId, PUser user)
     
    ProjectGoal
    ProjectGoalService.getGoal(Long projectId, Long goalId, PUser user)
     
    List<ProjectGoal>
    ProjectGoalService.getGoals(Long projectId, PUser user)
     
    List<Project>
    ProjectService.getMyProjects(PUser user)
    Returns all projects the user manages or participates in.
    Project
    ProjectService.getProject(Long projectId, PUser user)
    Returns the project if the user is its manager or a member.
    Task
    TaskService.getTask(Long taskId, PUser user)
     
    List<Task>
    TaskService.getTasksForProject(Long projectId, PUser user)
     
    TaskService.TrackingSummary
    TaskService.getTrackingSummary(Long taskId, PUser user)
    Returns the total time tracked on a task: the sum of all completed spans plus, if tracking is currently running, the open span counted live up to now.
    List<TaskService.WorkSession>
    TaskService.getWorkSessions(Long taskId, PUser user)
    Returns the individual work sessions tracked on a task: each completed span, plus the open session (with until = null, counted live up to now) if tracking is running.
    Project
    ProjectService.removeDocument(Long projectId, Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
     
    Project
    ProjectService.removeMember(Long projectId, Long userId, PUser user)
     
    Project
    ProjectService.removeResource(Long projectId, Long resourceId, PUser user)
     
    void
    ProjectService.requireManager(Project project, PUser user)
    Ensures the user is the manager of the project.
    void
    ProjectService.requireManagerOrAdmin(Project project, PUser user)
    Ensures the user is the manager of the project, or an administrator.
    void
    ProjectService.requireMemberOrManager(Project project, PUser user)
    Ensures the user is the manager or a member of the project.
    Task
    TaskService.startTracking(Long taskId, PUser user)
    Starts time tracking on a task: opens a new TimeSpan.TimeSpanType.TIME_TRACKER span with the current server time and promotes the task to TaskStatus.STARTED.
    Task
    TaskService.stopTracking(Long taskId, PUser user)
    Stops time tracking on a task: closes the running span with the current server time, moves it into the task's
    invalid reference 
    timeSpent
    history and sets the task to TaskStatus.STOPPED.
    Task
    TaskService.toggleTracking(Long taskId, PUser user)
    Toggles time tracking on a task: stops it if running, otherwise starts it.
    Project
    ProjectService.transferManager(Long projectId, Long newManagerId, PUser actor)
    Hands the project over to another of its members.
    Task
    TaskService.unassignGoal(Long taskId, PUser user)
     
    Task
    TaskService.unassignTask(Long taskId, PUser user)
     
    ProjectGoal
    ProjectGoalService.updateGoal(Long projectId, Long goalId, ProjectGoalService.GoalData data, PUser user)
    Updates a goal's fields and replaces its properties.
    Project
    ProjectService.updateProject(Long projectId, ProjectService.ProjectData data, PUser user)
    Updates the editable fields of a project.
    Task
    TaskService.updateTask(Long taskId, TaskService.TaskData data, PUser user)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ResourceService.cancelReservation(Integer reservationId, PUser user)
    Cancels (deletes) a reservation and thereby releases the occupied slot.
    long
    ResourceService.countResourcesInGroup(Long groupId, PUser user)
    Counts the resources in a group for the lazy data provider.
    Resource
    ResourceService.createResource(Resource resource, Long groupId, PUser user)
     
    ResourceGroup
    ResourceService.createResourceGroup(String name, Department dept, PUser user)
     
    void
    ResourceService.deleteResource(Long resourceId, PUser user)
    Deletes a single resource and all reservations associated with it. * @param resourceId ID of the resource
    void
    ResourceService.deleteResourceGroup(Long groupId, PUser user)
    Deletes a resource group. * @param groupId ID of the group to delete
    List<ResourceReservation>
    ResourceService.getMyActiveReservations(Long resourceId, PUser user)
    Returns the reservations active at the point in time now that the given user holds on the resource.
    List<ResourceReservation>
    ResourceService.getReservationsForResource(Long resourceId, PUser user)
    Returns all reservations of a resource (past, active and future) as an occupancy overview.
    List<ResourceReservationDTO>
    ResourceService.getReservationsForResourceDTO(Long resourceId, PUser user)
    Returns a resource's reservations (past, active and future) flattened to ResourceReservationDTO for the admin occupancy overview.
    Resource
    ResourceService.getResource(Long resourceId, PUser user)
     
    List<ResourceGroup>
    ResourceService.getResourceGroupsByDepartment(Long departmentId, PUser user)
    Lists the resource groups of a department (for the admin group management screen).
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<ResourceSummaryDTO>
    ResourceService.getResourcesInGroup(Long groupId, PUser user, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Lists a resource group's resources for the admin resources grid, as a page of ResourceSummaryDTO.
    Resource
    ResourceService.partialUpdateResource(Long id, Resource patch, PUser user)
     
    Resource
    ResourceService.recordMqttValue(Long resourceId, String name, String value, PUser user)
    Records a telemetry value for a resource addressed by its numeric id.
    ResourceGroup
    ResourceService.renameResourceGroup(Long groupId, String newName, PUser user)
    Renames a resource group (the only editable field).
    ResourceReservation
    ResourceService.reserveResource(Long resourceId, PUser user, Instant from, Instant until)

    PUser
    UserService.setRoles(Long userId, Set<Long> roleIds)
    Replaces the user's assigned roles with exactly the roles identified by roleIds (a full replace: roles not in the set are unassigned, new ones are added).
    PUser
    UserService.updateUser(PUser user)

    Method
    Description

    UserService.findOptionalByUsername(String username)
    Looks a user up by name without hiding deactivated accounts, unlike UserService.findUserByUsername(String).

    UserService.createUser(PUser user)
    Creates a user.
    boolean
    AuthorizationService.hasPermission(PUser user, PAuthorizedObject targetObject, Action action)
    MAIN METHOD: Checks rights directly on a loaded JPA object (incl. inheritance).
    boolean
    AuthorizationService.hasPermission(PUser user, String absoluteObjectType, Long objectId, Action action)
    OVERLOAD FOR CONTROLLER: Allows the call with class name and ID directly from the API path.
    boolean
    AuthorizationService.isAdmin(PUser user)
    Whether the user is an administrator — either by the flag on the account or through a role named ADMIN.
